About Taho Surf
Local surf instructor  ·  Friendly & patient coaching style
Focus on safety & fun  ·  Suitable for all levels
Why Taho Surf?
Taho Surf Lesson is a local surf coaching brand based in Bali. With more than 20 years of experience riding Bali's infamous waves, we focus on helping beginners and intermediate surfers enjoy surfing in a fun, safe, and relaxed way. Our lessons are designed to build confidence, technique, and ocean awareness.
Experience & Surf Background

Certified by Balawista Indonesia Surf Rescue, Taho Surf ensures every lesson is led by safety-trained instructors, combining expert guidance with safe, fun surf experiences.

Surf Experience Location
  • All around Bali (Kedungu, Nusa Dua, Canggu, Uluwatu area)
  • Sumbawa
  • Lombok
  • Mentawai
  • Java (Jawa)

This wide range of surf spots helps us understand different wave types, conditions, and skill levels so we can always adjust lessons to what works best for you.

Certified by
Balawista Indonesia
Surf Rescue · Badung Bali
Our Services
All Services include:
Board, Rash guard, Sunscreen, Zinc, Wax, Surf equipment.

  • Improving style & confidence

Group Lesson

Our Teaching Method

Our lessons follow a clear structured, beginner-friendly method to ensure safety, progress, and fun in every session.

01
Preparation & Ocean Knowledge

Beach warm-up, basic surf theory, and ocean awareness. We explain wave behavior, currents, safety rules, and surf etiquette so students feel prepared before entering the water.

02
Technique & Guided Surf Practice

Students practice key techniques including paddling, pop-up, balance, and wave timing. The instructor stays close to guide wave selection and adjust coaching to each student's level.

03
Feedback & Progress Development

After the session, we provide clear feedback, correction, and practical tips for improvement, helping students understand their progress and how to get better next time.

Personal accident insurance is not included. Participants are responsible for their own coverage.
